title: StructuredTenderAnswer
summary: 3 promoted claims answer the request. Every statement below is bound to reviewed evidence by the claim contract.

sections.heading: Award rule
sections.body: The benchmark awards Lot 1 to the admissible offer with the highest corrected total score.

sections.heading: Corrected winner
sections.body: The corrective benchmark resolution supersedes the original decision and names Andes Clinical Supply as winner of Lot 1 with 94.1 corrected points.

sections.heading: Corrected score comparison
sections.body: DemoMed Ltd. is not awarded in the corrected benchmark because its 91.8 corrected points are below Andes Clinical Supply's 94.1 points after the warranty-score formula was fixed.

recommendation: Use the cited evidence and unresolved review items before taking a consequential procurement decision.
